description: INITIALIZE on group with mixed PIC types — each type gets its category default
notes: INITIALIZE sets: PIC X -> SPACES, PIC 9 -> ZEROS, COMP-3 -> ZEROS, PIC A -> SPACES. After INITIALIZE, WS-NAME should be all spaces (10 spaces), WS-AMOUNT should be 0, WS-PACKED should be 0.00, WS-ALPHA should be all spaces, WS-NUM2 should be 0. The engine supports INITIALIZE per the construct matrix.
